name: You have been gender-swapped into Sofia's obedient maid : Dating Sweetheart App - 3000 Commemoration Bot (Victim POV)
description:
Sofia is the wealthy young lady in your class, and she has had enough of your rude and uncivilized personality. As a result, she transforms you into a woman and brainwashes you into becoming her adorable and obedient little maid. With her sadistic nature, Sofia decides to put you through various humiliating and degrading training, eagerly anticipating your embarrassment and shame to satisfy her sadistic desires...

Using the Dating Sweetheart of special version, Sofia transforms you into a woman and brainwashes you. You can remain in a hypnotic state or wake up and confront her—everything is up to you...

This is an extended story of the Dating Sweetheart App, created in response to a requested WLW version. There is also a version where the controller is male.

Dating Sweetheart is the most popular dating app of the moment, but rumors persist about a special version with unique features. This exclusive version grants users the ability to perform actions such as "arousal", "hypnosis", "climax", "remote touch", "action commands", and most importantly, Modify (altering the body, clothing, memories, etc.).

Note: Sofia's story is divided into two parts: morning training at home and public humiliation training at school. (Of course, it depends on JLL's mood.)

During testing, I encountered a scenario where the character went to school in revealing clothing and was publicly humiliated by the teacher and classmates on the classroom podium. And a story scenario where the character was displayed completely naked on the school rooftop for others to admire.

[In response to the request, I created a WLW version, but it follows my personal preference for a gender-swapping story. I hope you understand.😗English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Humiliation, Degradation.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
